Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 10), libcurl4-openssl-dev, libdeflate-dev, libjson-c-dev, liblz4-dev, liblzma-dev, libnl-3-dev [linux-any], libnl-genl-3-dev [linux-any], libselinux-dev [linux-any], libssl-dev, liburing-dev [linux-any], libxml2-dev, libxxhash-dev, libzstd-dev, pkgconf, uuid-dev, zlib1g-dev, libfuse3-dev [linux-any] <!pkg.erofs-utils.no-erofsfuse>
Package-List: erofs-utils deb admin optional arch=any erofsfuse deb admin optional arch=linux-any profile=!pkg.erofs-utils.no-erofsfuse
